title: Faithfulness eval harness (LLM-judge + expert spot-check) on the exemplar
context: A faithfulness evaluation harness for ewing-survivorship-late-effects that checks each assertion against its cited source, combining an automated LLM-judge with a required expert spot-check. It backs the no-source-no-claim rule and is a precondition for promoting any entry toward publish; it never substitutes for the blocking clinical/advocate sign-off.
objective: Build a faithfulness eval harness (LLM-judge + expert spot-check) that scores the exemplar's assertions against their cited sources and reports failures for fix-or-withhold.
acceptanceCriteria: Harness scores each assertion in the exemplar for faithfulness against its cited source and reports a per-assertion result
Combines an automated LLM-judge pass with a structured expert spot-check step (results recorded)
Any assertion below the agreed threshold is surfaced for fix-or-withhold; harness runs in CI/repeatably
Provider-neutral integration; no PII or source full-text leaked into logs
output: packages/eval: faithfulness eval harness (LLM-judge + expert spot-check) plus an exemplar eval report
